User.title: User Profile
User.description: Each user's primary profile and study meta-information

studyStreak.description: Current consecutive study streak in days

totalStudyHours.description: Total study hours accumulated across all subjects

joinDate.description: ISO date when the user signed up

profilePicture.description: URL or local placeholder name for the user's avatar

SubjectProgress.title: Subject Progress
SubjectProgress.description: Progress metrics and completion state for a single physics subject

completedSubtopics.description: List of subtopic IDs or names completed by the user

studyHours.description: Total study hours spent on this subject

lastStudiedDate.description: Last date studied in ISO format

longestStudyGap.description: Longest gap in days between study sessions

averageStudyGap.description: Average gap in days between study sessions

StudySession.title: Study Session
StudySession.description: A single study session entry representing a completed block of study

sessionId.description: Unique identifier of the study session

durationMinutes.description: Duration of the study session in minutes

notes.description: Optional summary or study notes written by the user

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user profile and overview metrics

/users/{userId}/subjectProgress/{subject.description: Progress tracking for each physics subject for a specific user

/users/{userId}/studySessions/{sessionId.description: Detailed log of study sessions for historical tracking and statistics
